## Summary

<!-- What does this change, and why? One or two sentences. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New lint rule
- [ ] New CLI command / flag
- [ ] Viewer change
- [ ] Docs / chore

## Checks

- [ ] `node --check` passes on all touched JS files
- [ ] Ran `node bin/cli.js scan`, `lint`, `duplicates`, and `serve` against a real `.claude/` directory
- [ ] Updated `README.md` if behavior or flags changed
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies added (or: listed them below with justification)

## Notes

<!-- Anything the reviewer should know — tradeoffs, follow-ups,
screenshots for viewer changes, etc. -->
